Venkata Sai Priyamvadha Rega

Hi Samarth, this sounds like a really interesting project. My background is in Python backend development, APIs, and data systems, and I’ve been exploring AI workflows and LLM-based applications recently. I’m particularly interested in how agentic systems are being used to build real-world applications. Would love to connect and follow the work your team is doing.

Good luck with the hiring. Hope you find the right person!

#AIDeveloper #AIAgents #AgenticAI #AIEngineering #GenerativeAI #LLM #AIProduct #LangGraph #LangChain #OpenAIAPI #PythonDevelopers #MachineLearningEngineer #HiringNow #AIJobs #ContractToHire #RemoteJobs #MultiAgentSystems #AIArchitecture #PromptEngineering #ProductionAI #hiring

Thank you for your report

COO - Driving Product, Growth & Operations at SkipForce || MS in BA-PM @UCONN || Managing Partner, DoTech Technologies || Active Recruiter || Scrum & Agile || Technical Product Management

🚨 Hiring: AI Agent Developer (Contract to Hire | CST Hours)
I’m currently looking to work with top-tier AI developers who have hands-on experience building production-ready AI agents.

This is a high-impact, execution-focused project where we’ll be building 7 specialized AI agents across different use cases (Sales, Support, Training, etc.).

What I’m looking for:
- Strong experience with Python-based AI agents
- Hands-on with LangGraph / LangChain / agent orchestration frameworks
- Experience working with OpenAI APIs, tool calling, memory, and multi-agent systems, OpenClaw
- Familiarity with building end-to-end agentic workflows (backend + integration)
- Experience deploying agents to production environments (APIs, cloud, etc.)
- Understanding of prompt engineering + system design for real-world use cases

Bonus if you’ve worked with:
- Multi-agent coordination systems
- Voice AI / conversational agents
- CRM or workflow integrations

Important:
- You must have built and deployed real AI agents (not just experiments)
- Please reach out only with your portfolio / live projects / case studies
- Availability in CST (US timezone) is required
- This is a contract-to-hire opportunity for the right fit

I’m not looking for average execution here; I’m looking for people who understand systems, not just tools.

If that’s you, DM me with your work.
Let’s build something solid.
